title: oncoba tettensis var. fissistyla
intro: Oncoba tettensis var. fissistyla is a plant species belonging to the family Salicaceae, commonly known as the African bloodwood tree. Traditionally, this plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Oncoba tettensis var. fissistyla include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and wounds, as well as its potential in lowering blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, the bark of the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, or extracts, which can be used to treat the mentioned health conditions.
